title: BURNSIDE SHELTER - 211info
text: BURNSIDE SHELTER BURNSIDE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an overnight shelter with 100 beds. Provides food, sleeping mats, and hygiene supplies. 30 SW 2nd Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older who identify as women. Pets permitted as space allows. Hours: 7 days per week 8pm-8am Email (503) 227-0810 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 227-0810 Main phone Main phone (503) 227-0810 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. First-come, first-served. Priority is given to guests from the previous night. New guest lineup begins no earlier than 30 minutes before opening. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet busline 20. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BURNSIDE SHELTER
